name: cyberskill-landing-page
description: CyberSkill interactive storytelling landing page (Lumi the Golden Genie). Built per the research-foundations PRD/SRS under the CyberOS workflow.

comments.progressiveEnhancement: three / @react-three/* / gsap / lenis power the Phase-3 enhancement only. They are real dependencies (the build compiles the scene chunk), but the chunk is dynamically imported with ssr:false and only mounted on capable desktops with motion allowed, so it never blocks first paint, never ships to mobile/reduced-motion clients, and the crawlable Phase-1 base + Phase-2 chat work without it.
comments.noAnthropicSdk: The /api/genie proxy calls the Anthropic Messages API with plain fetch + SSE parsing to avoid an SDK version dependency and keep the server bundle small.
